prompt: I changed a schema and ran make build but I'm getting errors in the Go generation step. The error mentions a missing import for a $ref to another construct. How does the Go generator resolve cross-package references, and what do I need to add to my schema?

assertions.name: explains_go_generator_mechanism
assertions.description: Explains how generate-golang.js discovers and resolves external $ref targets

assertions.name: mentions_x_go_type
assertions.description: Tells user to add x-go-type annotation

assertions.name: mentions_x_go_type_import
assertions.description: Tells user to add x-go-type-import with the Go import path

assertions.name: provides_concrete_example
assertions.description: Includes a concrete YAML example showing the annotations

assertions.name: mentions_ref_alongside_go_type
assertions.description: Shows that $ref and x-go-type are used together on the same field

assertions.name: does_not_suggest_manual_go_edit
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest editing generated Go files directly
